text:
In the first scene, I feel a nervous anticipation as I prepare to enter the conference room. I notice the formality—the neat rows of chairs, the glowing projection, the sense of waiting. There is both excitement and a touch of anxiety in the air, as if ideas are ready to bloom amidst the expectant silence.

In the second scene, the vibrant colors and strong visual design energize me. Here, curiosity and wonder replace nerves. The R+D wall feels alive with creativity, a celebration of experimentation and learning. It is as if I’m being invited to dive into the boundless possibilities of imaginative inquiry.
